title: Preconception Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Preconception Care 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MIDWIFERY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers preconception counseling and individualized prenatal care; able to co-care for some health issues and can take late transfers with previous prenatal care established. Team of midwives and students serve families in a free-standing birth center and at home births, including water births. Postpartum care offered at birthing center or at patient's home and continues for both mother and baby for up to 6 weeks. Postpartum care includes newborn exam/screening, hearing screening, weight-checks, any lab work needed for mother, and can end with a well-woman exam. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MIDWIFERY CARE
